summary: Pure integration work wiring existing, tested modules into the entry point. No new patterns, dependencies, or architectural decisions introduced.

techContextDeviations.justification: Ticket explicitly states 'Rendering backend can still be a placeholder.' Three.js introduction is deferred to a later story when 3D visuals are needed. No architectural lock-in — swapping canvas for Three.js later only affects scene.ts and renderLoop.ts.

analysis.privacyCompliance: pass — no new storage, network calls, or identifier exposure
analysis.definitionOfDoneAlignment: full — plan covers build verification, no console errors, no forbidden APIs, autoplay resilience, and UI controls

risks.description: Canvas init ordering relative to audio init could cause a brief blank frame if audio blocks
risks.mitigation: Plan correctly recommends canvas init before audio init

suggestions.description: resize.ts is not in the recommended module split from CLAUDE.md — consider whether attachResizeHandler should live in scene.ts to match the documented structure, or update the module split documentation
